title: decaloba pallida
intro: Decaloba pallida, also known as the White Ashoka or White Saraca, is a plant species belonging to the family Sapindaceae, native to the tropical regions of Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in Ayurvedic medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Decaloba pallida include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve skin and hair health, and support cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as decoctions and infusions, are commonly used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
